content.text:
Checking the current branch and whether it's been merged into the default branch.

[REDACTED]

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git branch --show-current && git status -sb && git remote -v
input.description: Show current branch and git status

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git branch -a --merged main 2>/dev/null || git branch -a --merged master 2>/dev/null; git log --oneline -1 HEAD; git log --oneline -1 origin/main 2>/dev/null || git log --oneline -1 origin/master 2>/dev/null
input.description: Check if branch merged into main

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git fetch origin main 2>&1 && git merge-base --is-ancestor HEAD origin/main && echo "MERGED: HEAD is ancestor of origin/main" || echo "NOT MERGED: HEAD is not ancestor of origin/main"
input.description: Fetch main and check merge ancestry

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && gh pr list --head fix/project-change-cache-consumer-namespace --state all --json number,title,state,mergedAt,url 2>&1
input.description: Find PR for current branch on GitHub

content.text:
**No** — `fix/project-change-cache-consumer-namespace` has not been merged.

Evidence:

1. **PR [#260](https://github.com/trilogy-group/ab-agno/pull/260)** is still **open** (`fix(change-detector): isolate snapshot cache per consumer`).
2. Your branch tip (`aefb25f`) is **not** on `origin/main` (latest main: `0fbc18c`).
3. The branch does **not** appear in `git branch --merged main`.

It’s pushed to `origin/fix/project-change-cache-consumer-namespace` and in sync with the remote, but it hasn’t landed on `main` yet.

[REDACTED]
